subject: Re: stripey stripe stripe
body:
Apologies for the spam, it seems I cannot share data more than 8mb on the
forum, a decimated version of the image is now attached
Best,
Pranav
--
Pranav Shah
Postdoctoral Research Fellow.

Division of Structural Biology,
Wellcome Trust Centre for Human Genetics,
University of Oxford,
Roosevelt Drive, Oxford OX3 7BN,
UK

> Bugger, the image failed to attach... try this one...
> Best,
> Pranav

> On Tue, Jan 5, 2021 at 8:12 PM Pranav Shah <p.shah.lab@gmail.com> wrote:
>
>> Hi Dimitry,
>>
>> I am processing a Falcon 4 dataset and i am consistently seeing a band in
>> the right third of image following motion correction. I dont see this
>> artefact when I processed the same dataset using MotionCor2, could you help
>> understand what is causing this and if should fret about it? Image attached
>> for reference.
>>
>>
>> Best,
>> Pranav
>>
